title: Message expiry: senderExpiresAt and burnOnRead
description: Implement sender-controlled message expiry in nie-daemon. senderExpiresAt: schedule hard deletion (row removal, no tombstone) at deadline; carry value in ClearMessage so receiving daemon can also schedule. burnOnRead: hard-delete immediately after Message/set readAt update. messageExpirySeconds: per-Chat local expiry policy enforced by daemon background task. None of these require relay visibility.
close_reason: Implemented: Message/set update (reactions, body edit, soft-delete, readAt/burn-on-read), destroy (hard-delete). senderExpiresAt/burnOnRead fields on create. DB v2 migration. Background expiry reaper task. All tests pass.
